expectations.evidence: Has '## Task Overview' table with columns #, Task, Depends on, Parallel — lists all 6 tasks
All 6 tasks have '### Context' sections with extensive background — e.g., Task 2 explains dual-mode strategy, req.user contract, auth method tagging, and why no route handlers change
All 6 tasks have '### Acceptance Criteria' with checkbox items
All 6 tasks have '### Dependencies' with 'Blocked by:' and 'Blocks:' lines
No spec exists for this eval. All context is inline and self-contained
API changes (T1-T3), frontend (T4), mobile (T5), backward compatibility (T2 dual-mode), cleanup (T6)
Has Goal, Task Overview table, then numbered '## Task N: Name' sections with consistent subsection structure
